sections.title: When trying to interact with the Pool of Nightmares before talking to her for the first time

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: I would advise against doing that, traveller. You do not yet know what you are up against.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: The offer is appreciated. Luckily for us though, the Nightmare is not present in Mother's mind at the moment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. If that changes, I'm more than willing to help.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Be safe, traveller.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: The offer is appreciated. I fear you do not have the abilities to take on that sort of challenge though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What abilities do I need?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: The horror that has manifested itself in Mother's mind is far stronger than the one fought in the Nightmare's dream.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: If you hope to have a chance, you'll want to take on the weaker form first. That Siren down there can help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. I'll be back once I have more experience.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: That would be appreciated, traveller. You can use the pool here to enter Mother's mind and take on the Nightmare within.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Be safe, traveller.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: That would be appreciated, traveller. You can use the pool here to enter Mother's mind and take on the Nightmare within.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Be warned though. If you enter, you enter alone. No one else can help you with this one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I'll have to be careful then.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Indeed. Good luck, traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing up here?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Keeping an eye on Mother.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mother?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Phosani, the founder of our sect and creator of this sanctuary. She is our mother, and always will be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see... So where is she?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: She lies in this coffin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... So she's dead?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Dead? No. She sleeps the everlasting slumber.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right. The coffin looks pretty secure to me. Why do you need to keep an eye on her.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: The creature down there, the one that Siren calls the Nightmare. It has been invading Mother's mind, feeding on her.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Mother is strong, but not strong enough to fight it off alone. She needs help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Needs help does she? Maybe I could be of assistance?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I'll have to be careful then.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: I do, traveller. You should be more cautious with them.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Greetings, traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Nightmare.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: You're better off speaking with the Siren, that is her area of expertise. All I know is that the beast poses a huge risk to Mother.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: At least for the moment, Mother is not in any direct danger. I fear it is only a matter of time before the beast enters her mind again though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's with the mask?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: These are the masks of the Sisterhood. While symbolic, they also have practical uses.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh really? What like?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Herbs can be stored within the beak, masking the smell of death and preventing us from becoming infected.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds handy. Can I have one?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: No. To wear a mask of the Sisterhood, you need to join the Sisterhood.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well sign me up!

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: I'm afraid you lack the qualities we're currently looking for. Perhaps another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any of my items?

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: I do, traveller. You should be more cautious with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Sister Senga
lines.text: Be safe, traveller.
